about.title: About
about.text: Cloud consultant specialized in migrating and modernizing applications to Azure, with over 10 years of experience. Expert in Java, Angular, Terraform, and CI/CD, I help companies build reliable, secure, and sustainable infrastructures.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about my services and working methods
faq.a1: I work across three main areas: migration and modernization of applications to Azure cloud, DevSecOps consulting and implementation (CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code, security), and technical training on DevOps and Cloud topics for your teams.
faq.q2: Do you offer DevOps & Cloud training?
faq.a2: Yes, I design and deliver tailored training sessions adapted to your team's level: Azure cloud introduction, DevOps practices, CI/CD with GitHub Actions or Azure DevOps, Infrastructure as Code with Terraform, or FinOps fundamentals. Training can be delivered in person or remotely.
faq.q3: How does a typical mission work?
faq.a3: After an initial discussion to frame your needs, I propose a clear technical roadmap. We move forward in stages: framing, implementation, testing, delivery — with built-in skills transfer so your teams remain autonomous after the mission.
faq.q4: How do you handle infrastructure security?
faq.a4: Security is built in from the start: fine-grained access management (IAM, RBAC), encryption of data at rest and in transit, automated scanning in CI/CD pipelines, and DevSecOps best practices throughout the engagement.
faq.q5: Do you work independently or with an internal team?
faq.a5: Both are possible. I can lead a mission fully independently or integrate with your existing team (developers, ops, project managers) using your tools and processes. I adapt to your organization.
faq.a6: I offer two modes: fixed-price for missions with a defined scope, or time-and-materials at a daily rate for evolving missions. A detailed quote is always provided before work begins.
faq.q7: Do you work remotely or on-site?
faq.a7: I work primarily remotely for flexibility, but I can travel on-site when needed. I'm based in Toulouse and work across France.
